validation_findings.detail: Consumer wiring accepted only RIL-04 projection bundle and projection artifact contracts.
Consumer outputs were derived via field passthrough without mutation or enforcement semantics.
Signals including enforcement_block/control_escalation are treated as non-authoritative downstream intake signals.

non_authoritative_notice: Read-only consumer intake/view artifact only; signals such as enforcement_block or control_escalation are non-authoritative and require independent governed decisions.
